tool.name: nextflow_apptainer
tool.description: This pipeline is dedicated to finding the most stable genes across count datasets
tool.command:
export NXF_APPTAINER_CACHEDIR=/tmp/apptainer_cache && mkdir -p \${NXF_APPTAINER_CACHEDIR}
&& nextflow run /home/olivier/repositories/nf-core-stableexpression/test.nf -profile apptainer -ansi-log false --outdir ./results
&& echo "$species" > results/species.txt
&& zip -r results.zip results
